div.style: max-width:140px;background:#fff; border:solid 1px #dadada;font-family:Arial; font-size:12px; font-weight:normal; text-align:center; padding: 10px 2px 10px 2px; line-height:normal;vertical-alignment:middle

div.a: Tell your friends the story behind your purchase or donation

fbcommentscript.div:
We're sure you have a story behind what made you make this purchase or donation.
Go on, share it with your friends!
